title: xylotheca stuhlmannii
intro: Xylotheca stuhlmannii, also known as the African trumpet tree or red-stemmed xylotheca, is a species of flowering plant in the family Achariaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in African folk medicine, exhibiting medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Xylotheca stuhlmannii include treating various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, often used to treat various health conditions in traditional African medicine.
